summary: Tested Per Stimuli expandable sections in Light Stimulus tab. HRA and HRV Per Stimuli features are implemented and mostly working. Found one code issue: excluded recordings are hidden from per-stim tables instead of being shown with grayed-out styling.

ui_bugs.issue: Excluded recordings are completely hidden from per-stim tables instead of shown with opacity-40 styling. When a recording is toggled OFF, it disappears from all per-stim tables rather than being grayed out.
ui_bugs.selector: perStimHRAData useMemo lines 485-530, perStimHRVData useMemo lines 535-576
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Change from filtering out excluded recordings early (line 485: const includedRecs = ...) to showing all recordings but only calculating averages/medians from included ones. The render code at line 1105 already checks isExcluded but it never evaluates to true because excluded recordings are filtered before reaching the render.

action_items: Optional fix: Update perStimHRAData and perStimHRVData useMemo hooks to include all recordings in display while only calculating averages/medians from non-excluded ones
critical_code_review_comments: FolderComparison.js lines 62-63: hraPerStimExpanded and hrvPerStimExpanded state correctly added
FolderComparison.js lines 482-530: perStimHRAData useMemo correctly computes 5 stimulation tables with AVERAGES
FolderComparison.js lines 532-576: perStimHRVData useMemo correctly computes 5 stimulation tables with MEDIANS
FolderComparison.js line 1068: HRA Per Stimuli button has correct data-testid='expand-hra-per-stim'
FolderComparison.js line 1210: HRV Per Stimuli button has correct data-testid='expand-hrv-per-stim'
FolderComparison.js lines 1092-1100: HRA Per Stimuli tables have all 9 metrics columns (Baseline BF, Avg BF, Peak BF, Peak %, TTP, Rec. BF, Rec. %, Amp., RoC)
FolderComparison.js lines 1233-1236: HRV Per Stimuli tables have 3 metrics columns (ln(RMSSD70) corr., ln(SDNN70) corr., pNN5070 corr. (%))
FolderComparison.js line 1132: HRA Per Stimuli shows 'Folder Average' label
FolderComparison.js line 1262: HRV Per Stimuli shows 'Folder Median' label (correct - HRV uses median)
FolderComparison.js line 1117: Recordings with no stim data correctly show '—' dashes

success_rate.frontend: 95% (Per Stimuli feature working, minor toggle display issue)

seed_data_creation: Used existing folder: H9 hCO + Light Stimulus with 8 recordings (including 1 with no stims: H9-Light/Pre-Nepi-C4)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Per Stimuli feature tested. Key test IDs: expand-hra-per-stim, expand-hrv-per-stim, toggle-hra-stim{N}-{recId}, toggle-hrv-stim{N}-{recId}. HRA uses AVERAGE for folder aggregate, HRV uses MEDIAN. No-stims recording shows dashes. Toggle behavior hides excluded recordings from per-stim tables.

features_verified.hra_per_stim_button: PASS - Button with data-testid='expand-hra-per-stim' below Normalized to Baseline
features_verified.hra_per_stim_5_tables: PASS - Shows Stimulation 1-5 tables when expanded
features_verified.hra_per_stim_metrics: PASS - All 9 HRA metrics: Baseline BF, Avg BF, Peak BF, Peak %, TTP, Rec. BF, Rec. %, Amp., RoC
features_verified.hra_per_stim_folder_average: PASS - Shows 'Folder Average (n=X)' with AVERAGE values
features_verified.hrv_per_stim_button: PASS - Button with data-testid='expand-hrv-per-stim' in HRV card
features_verified.hrv_per_stim_5_tables: PASS - Shows Stimulation 1-5 tables when expanded
features_verified.hrv_per_stim_metrics: PASS - 3 corrected HRV metrics: ln(RMSSD70) corr., ln(SDNN70) corr., pNN5070 corr. (%)
features_verified.hrv_per_stim_folder_median: PASS - Shows 'Folder Median (n=X)' with MEDIAN values (not average)
features_verified.no_stim_recording_dashes: PASS - H9-Light/Pre-Nepi-C4 (no stims) shows '—' in all per-stim tables
features_verified.toggle_affects_calculations: PARTIAL PASS - Toggle affects average/median calculations but excluded recordings are hidden instead of grayed out

playwright_tests.no_stims_shows_dashes: PASS - 77 dash cells found for no-stims recording
playwright_tests.toggle_updates_n_count: PASS - Folder Average changed from n=8 to n=7 after toggle

hydration_warnings: Console shows React hydration warnings: '<tr> cannot be child of <span>', '<span> cannot be child of <tbody>'
These warnings are from the table rendering but don't affect functionality
Likely caused by React dev mode wrapper elements
notes: All Per Stimuli features are functional. The toggle behavior difference (hiding vs graying out) is a minor UX inconsistency - the main tables show excluded recordings grayed out, but per-stim tables hide them completely. This doesn't affect data accuracy, just visual consistency.
